name: node-optionator
title: node-optionator
description:
option parsing and help generation
Optionator is a JavaScript option parsing and help generation library used by
eslint, Grasp, LiveScript, esmangle, escodegen, and many more.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-optionator because option parsing and help generation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-optionator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-optionator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-optionator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
